required_interlock: IL-01 helium isolation (no He flow during Mode B); IL-02 sensing-line isolation
thermal_condition: Sample stage at baseline cryogenic temperature with stable load; capacity for Mode B heat dump available via non-MC path
vacuum_condition: Base vacuum verified; process gas lines isolated and pressurized to process spec; growth-zone vent line ready
contamination_condition: Baseline clean state verified by RGA; witness coupon installed at clean state
radiation_condition: Shutter stack closed on sensing side; radiation budget irrelevant during Mode B
rf_condition: RF/microwave drive de-energized on sensing side; Mode B fs-laser interlock armed
optical_condition: Mode D NV readout laser off; aperture chain irrelevant during Mode B
vibration_condition: Stage at baseline vibration spec; Mode B mechanical actuators armed
NV_baseline_condition: N/A (sensing not active in Mode B)

required_interlock: IL-01 maintained; IL-02 maintained; growth-zone vent armed; cryotrap/NEG isolation valves armed
thermal_condition: Mode B heat dump complete; stage temperature returning toward Mode-D baseline
vacuum_condition: Process gas lines isolated; chamber pumping to base; cryotrap/NEG online
contamination_condition: Mode B process fragments captured by SHIELD-009 cryopanels (or accepted as Mode-D-side gap); RGA species-resolved residuals being monitored
radiation_condition: Shutter stack remains closed on sensing side

required_interlock: IL-01 helium permission re-armed for Mode D (helium ABSENT during Mode B was the constraint); IL-02 sensing-line permission armed; all process interlocks reset; SHIELD-008 clean shutter armed
thermal_condition: Sample stage temperature recovered to within Mode D baseline tolerance; cumulative heat load below Mode D budget; mixing chamber load within capacity
vacuum_condition: Base vacuum at Mode D spec; cryotrap/NEG online; no active process gas lines
contamination_condition: RGA residuals below Mode D thresholds for every species in cryopanel_memory_model.csv (H2, CH4, hydrocarbons, H2O, CO, CO2, fragments); QCM mass uptake below threshold; witness coupon analysis acceptable
radiation_condition: Radiation/RF/optical/blackbody leakage budget into 10 mK below Mode D heat budget (radiation_rf_leakage_budget.csv all entries within budget)
rf_condition: Microwave/RF leakage below Mode D heat AND dephasing budget; filter chain thermalized at every stage
optical_condition: No direct room-temperature or Mode B process line-of-sight into 10 mK sensing region (optical_line_of_sight_audit.csv); cold aperture chain integrity verified; cold beam dumps absorbing as designed
NV_baseline_condition: NV ODMR contrast, T2*, and Ramsey baseline recovered to pre-Mode-B reference

required_interlock: IL-01 maintained; IL-02 maintained until end of measurement
thermal_condition: Stage at Mode D baseline; cumulative heat from D readout below per-cycle budget
contamination_condition: RGA continuing to monitor; witness coupon re-checked
radiation_condition: Radiation budget unchanged during Mode D operation
vibration_condition: Vibration logged for Mode D budget compliance
NV_baseline_condition: NV baseline re-logged for cross-cycle drift
